review_title: A comprehensive IT management tool, but still somewhat limited
description: After using XEOX in tandem with WithSecure for a year, it’s clear that the service has strong potential but must evolve to meet the demands of a competitive landscape. Expanding the script library, especially for security-focused scripts, could make XEOX an indispensable tool for IT security and maintenance.
author: Benjamin M.
pros: XEOX is a robust solution, actively supported with regular updates that enhance its feature set. It enables cost-effective patch management, script deployment (handy when GPOs are impractical), detailed asset inventory, and application deployment through Chocolatey. These features streamline IT management and allow admins to handle various maintenance tasks seamlessly within their environment.
cons: The biggest limitation is the dependency on Chocolatey for all application management tasks, including installation and updates, which restricts flexibility. Critical capabilities like application uninstallation and non-Windows software updates are absent, which leaves vulnerabilities unaddressed that other tools (such as WithSecure and CCleaner) would cover. Additionally, the interface could be more intuitive; current ergonomic issues slow down workflow and impact the overall user experience.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: XEOX, THE RELIABLE ONE-STOP SYSTEMS MANAGER
description: XEOX made it easy for me to handle my company’s computer systems with great services ranging from systems security, automated systems updates, communication and coordination, to management of system patches. I can recommend XEOX to a buddy anytime!

cons: XEOX generally offers amazing features that are useful to an organization of going concern. So long as you are okay with the billing, you're all sorted.

review_title: XEOX in Focus: What Works and What Could Be Better
author: Vijay P.
pros: XEOX stands out for its intuitive interface and powerful automation capabilities, making IT management significantly more efficient. The software excels in patch management, remote monitoring, and centralized control, which allows IT teams to streamline operations and minimize manual tasks. Its ability to automate software updates, manage devices remotely, and ensure compliance with security policies makes it an ideal tool for managing diverse IT environments. The dashboard is user-friendly, providing clear insights into network health, asset inventory, and potential issues, which helps in proactive decision-making and faster troubleshooting.
cons: One drawback of XEOX is its learning curve, particularly for users who are new to IT management platforms. While the interface is intuitive, the depth of features and customization options can be overwhelming initially, requiring time and effort to fully utilize its capabilities. Additionally, some users might find that advanced features, such as certain integrations or scripting capabilities, lack detailed documentation, making it harder to configure them effectively. Occasional delays in support response times can also be a challenge, especially when dealing with critical issues. This can lead to frustration when troubleshooting more complex problems or implementing new features.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Insgesamt bietet XEOX eine benutzerfreundliche Oberfläche, eine breite Palette von Funktionen und Skalierbarkeit. Es bietet diese Funktionen: Optimiertes Patchmanagement, Sicherer Fernzugriff, Automatisierung, Port-basierte Netzwerkzugangskontrolle (PNAC), Überwachung und Alarmierung
author: Nick M.
pros: XEOX bietet Funktionen wie optimiertes Patchmanagement und sicheren Fernzugriff für den IT-Betrieb und wird in unserem Unternehmen weltweit eingesetzt. Das Tool bietet sehr viele Möglichkeiten, dass man wirklich alles damit machen kann und jede Software (sehr grosser Softwarekatalog vorhanden) sehr einfach unbeaufsichtigt verteilt und gepatcht werden kann - danke an den überaus freundlichen und hilfsbereiten Support, der uns eine kostenlose Einführung gegeben hat! Der Remote Support der nur einen Internetbrowser benötigt, bietet sehr viele sicherheitsrelevante Einstellungen für den IT-Support, für die Fernwartung der Server bzw. für den User-Support. Besonders gut hat uns gefallen, dass wir uns mit dem Tool auf NIS-2 vorbereiten konnten und dort auch gleich das Erweiterungsmodul "PNAC" (Port-based Network Access Control) einsetzen konnten, um nur Zugriff auf uns bekannte Geräte im Netzwerk zu gewähren. Die Implementierung ging sehr schnell und hat unsere Netzwerktechniker sehr beeindruckt. Die Überwachung und Alarmierung der Geräte auf Verfügbarkeit z.B. per E-Mail ist einfach zu handhaben. Derzeit kann man abfragen, ob ein Gerät online ist und systemrelevante Daten wie z.B. die HD-Größen etc.! Positiv zu erwähnen ist der Preis, der unser IT-Management zum Kauf des Tools bewogen hat.
cons: Das Tool bietet sehr viele Möglichkeiten, was leider nicht auf den ersten Blick ersichtlich ist - daher nur 4 Sterne.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

cons: The powerful dashboard can be confusing at first but once you get to know it it is really helpful.

Whenever we experience problems the customer support immediately finds a solution.

Since we use XEOX adding a new device to our network takes minimal time. Once the agent is installed the device is added in the CMDB. With the option to distribute software within defined groups or on certain devices work time can be cut in half.
cons: We have been using XEOX for several years now and with every update it keeps improving, issues get fixed and new features are added.
